resources.string: No conversations yet - tap + to start
Type a message to start the conversation
Delete conversation \"%1$s\"? This cannot be undone.
You\'ll need to enter it again to keep chatting with AI.
The API key was rejected by OpenAI.
Rate limit exceeded, try again shortly.
The file is too large (limit ~30,000 characters). Trim it or send a fragment.
The PDF is too large (limit 5 MB).
GPT-5.6 Luna - better quality ($1.00 / $6.00 per 1M tokens)
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite - cheapest ($0.25 / $1.50 per 1M tokens, free tier eligible)

A key from a Google Cloud project without billing uses the free tier: Flash models are free within daily limits, but Google may use conversation content for training. A key with billing enabled is paid and excluded from training.
Gemini 3 Flash - balanced ($0.50 / $3.00 per 1M tokens, free tier eligible)
Gemini 3.5 Flash - better quality ($1.50 / $9.00 per 1M tokens)
Claude Sonnet 5 - better quality ($2.00 / $10.00 per 1M tokens until Aug 2026, then $3.00 / $15.00)
No app found to handle this action.
Couldn\'t read the action details. Please try again.
Delete %1$d conversations? This cannot be undone.
Free, but you\'re sharing your messages with them.
Built-in search of the active provider: %1$s
A quick guide to the features
Require your fingerprint, face, or screen lock to open the app
Set a screen lock (PIN, pattern, fingerprint…) on your device to use this

The app supports three providers: OpenAI (ChatGPT), Google (Gemini), and Anthropic (Claude). Each offers three models, from cheapest to most capable. Switch the active provider on the main screen or in Settings; the model is chosen per conversation in the chat screen (defaults to the cheapest available).

Each provider needs its own API key, entered in Settings → AI providers. Keys are encrypted locally (Android Keystore) and never leave the phone except in direct calls to that provider\'s servers — this app has no backend of its own.

Below each AI reply, under the conversation title, and on the main screen you\'ll see an estimated cost in euros. It\'s an approximation based on the provider\'s pricing and the daily EUR/USD rate — it doesn\'t account for hosted search fees (billed per query) or cache discounts.
In Settings → Context facts you can save information about yourself for the AI to know — global facts (visible in every conversation) or facts picked per conversation from the chat screen.

The AI can ask to perform actions on your phone: add a calendar event, set an alarm or timer, draft an SMS, open navigation, or save a note. Each one shows a confirmation card first — nothing happens without your approval. Weather and web search run automatically in the background. Switch the search source (Tavily or the provider\'s built-in search) in Settings → Tools.
You can attach a photo, a PDF, or a text/CSV file to a message (the paperclip next to the input field). Photos are automatically downscaled before sending.

Every message you send carries the last 20 messages of that conversation, so the AI remembers what was said. This also means an attached file or photo is resent with every following message as long as it\'s within those 20 — and counted toward the cost each time.
In Settings you can change the chat font size (Small/Normal/Large/Extra large).

On the main screen: the magnifying glass searches the text of all conversations; long-press a conversation tile to rename, delete (individually or in bulk), or pin it. Conversations are sorted by their most recent message, with pinned ones always on top.
No facts yet - tap + to add one
No selectable facts - add them in Settings
